jsonLd.title: Sharekhan is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!
